spec_match.rationale: No-developer-visible-change feature — by definition the API doesn't expose the new behaviour, so the demo can only probe indirectly. Honest about the limit but doesn't fully match the spec's framing.

interactive.rationale: 4 buttons / 0 inputs / 0 selects / 0 ranges driving live JS — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Either the feature-index blurb or the concept lede is missing — can't verify alignment.

edge_cases.rationale: Some fallback / error handling is present but corner cases like removed-element behaviour, denied permission flow, or no-support browsers aren't all covered.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the required canonical ChromeStatus self-heal link https://chromestatus.com/feature/4977371751645184.

design_system.rationale: All colours come from the shared CSS variables and the layout follows the stage + controls editorial pattern.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: incognito-detection probe (before-state) vs the new stable v
openQuestions.detail: The predictable-reported-storage-quota feature's headline framing — StorageManager.estimate() now reports a predictable quota that doesn't leak incognito-vs-regular state — calls out "incognito-detection probe (before-state) vs the new stable value". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: any genuine usage of quota planning
openQuestions.detail: The predictable-reported-storage-quota feature's headline framing — StorageManager.estimate() now reports a predictable quota that doesn't leak incognito-vs-regular state — calls out "any genuine usage of quota planning". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Cover at least one realistic failure mode
openQuestions.detail: Add feature detection at the top of the script and surface the result. Handle the permission-denied / API-rejection case in the catch branch with a visible message. If the feature is flag-gated or origin-trial, show explicitly what the page does when the API is absent.

openQuestions.title: Align the concept lede with the feature-index blurb
openQuestions.detail: The blurb on the feature index sells one promise; the concept lede frames a different angle. Either reword the lede to echo the blurb's keywords (so visitors recognise they're in the right place) or update the parent blurb.

summary: cross-origin-comparison under predictable-reported-storage-quota: 2 pass / 3 partial / 1 fail. Strong interactive surface, design system clean, spec story is partial — see open questions for the angles still missing. ChromeStatus reference link resolved.
